allow: Bash(matlab -nosplash -nodesktop -batch "addpath\(genpath\('.'\)\); files = dir\('**/*.m'\); errors = {}; for i=1:length\(files\); if ~contains\(files\(i\).folder, 'numbers'\) && ~contains\(files\(i\).folder, 'semantic_foraging'\); fp = fullfile\(files\(i\).folder, files\(i\).name\); try; checkcode\(fp\); disp\(['OK: ' files\(i\).name]\); catch ME; errors{end+1} = [files\(i\).name ': ' ME.message]; end; end; end; if isempty\(errors\); disp\('All files syntax OK'\); else; disp\(errors\); end; exit")

Bash(matlab -nosplash -nodesktop -batch "addpath\(genpath\('.'\)\); newFiles = {'fluency_config.m','fluency_main.m','utils/ptb_init.m','utils/ptb_close.m','utils/ptb_waitkey.m','utils/send_event.m','utils/play_sound.m','utils/make_sounds.m','utils/make_noise_texture.m','utils/run_block.m','utils/utils_createSubjDir.m'}; for i=1:length\(newFiles\); info=checkcode\(newFiles{i},'-string'\); if isempty\(info\); fprintf\('OK  %s\\n',newFiles{i}\); else; fprintf\('WARN  %s\\n',newFiles{i}\); for j=1:length\(info\); fprintf\('  L%d: %s\\n',info\(j\).line,info\(j\).message\); end; end; end; exit")

Bash(matlab -nosplash -nodesktop -batch "addpath\(genpath\('.'\)\); files={'fluency_config.m','fluency_main.m','utils/ptb_init.m','utils/ptb_close.m','utils/ptb_waitkey.m','utils/send_event.m','utils/play_sound.m','utils/make_sounds.m','utils/make_noise_texture.m','utils/run_block.m','utils/utils_createSubjDir.m'}; for i=1:length\(files\); info=checkcode\(files{i}\); if isempty\(info\); fprintf\('OK  %s\\n',files{i}\); else; fprintf\('WARN  %s\\n',files{i}\); for j=1:length\(info\); fprintf\('  L%d: %s\\n',info\(j\).line,info\(j\).message\); end; end; end; exit")

Bash(matlab -nosplash -nodesktop -batch "addpath\(genpath\('.'\)\); files={'fluency_config.m','fluency_main.m','utils/ptb_init.m','utils/ptb_close.m','utils/ptb_waitkey.m','utils/send_event.m','utils/play_sound.m','utils/make_sounds.m','utils/make_noise_texture.m','utils/run_block.m','utils/utils_createSubjDir.m'}; allOk=true; for i=1:length\(files\); info=checkcode\(files{i}\); if isempty\(info\); fprintf\('OK  %s\\n',files{i}\); else; fprintf\('WARN  %s\\n',files{i}\); for j=1:length\(info\); fprintf\('  L%d: %s\\n',info\(j\).line,info\(j\).message\); end; end; end; exit")

Bash(matlab -nosplash -nodesktop -batch "addpath\(genpath\('.'\)\); files={'fluency_config.m','fluency_main.m','utils/wait_interruptible.m','utils/run_block.m','utils/send_event.m','utils/ptb_init.m','utils/ptb_close.m','utils/ptb_waitkey.m','utils/play_sound.m','utils/make_sounds.m','utils/make_noise_texture.m','utils/utils_createSubjDir.m'}; for i=1:length\(files\); info=checkcode\(files{i}\); realIssues=info\(~strcmp\({info.message},'Extra semicolon is unnecessary.'\)\); if isempty\(realIssues\); fprintf\('OK  %s\\n',files{i}\); else; fprintf\('WARN  %s\\n',files{i}\); for j=1:length\(realIssues\); fprintf\('  L%d: %s\\n',realIssues\(j\).line,realIssues\(j\).message\); end; end; end; exit")

Bash(matlab -nosplash -nodesktop -batch "addpath\(genpath\('.'\)\); files={'fluency_main.m','utils/wait_interruptible.m'}; for i=1:length\(files\); info=checkcode\(files{i}\); real=info\(~strcmp\({info.message},'Extra semicolon is unnecessary.'\)\); if isempty\(real\); fprintf\('OK  %s\\n',files{i}\); else; fprintf\('WARN  %s\\n',files{i}\); for j=1:length\(real\); fprintf\('  L%d: %s\\n',real\(j\).line,real\(j\).message\); end; end; end; exit")
